productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Pink T-shirt
description: Style NoteThis dark pink coloured T-shirt from united colors of benetton states simplicity in fashion.  Combine this tee with a pair of jeans and you'll be all set to step out in style.Product DetailsDark pink colour featuring a polo collar, front button placket, logo design to the left chest and short sleevesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryDo not dry cleanSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
